name.ja: <ruby>道化の一座<rt>クラウン・クラン</rt></ruby>『<ruby>終演<rt>フィナーレ</rt></ruby>』

text.en: If you control a Tribute Summoned monster: Discard any number of cards, then target that many face-up cards on the field; destroy them. You can banish this card from your GY and Tribute 1 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, Pendulum, or Link Monster from your hand or field; add 1 "Clown Clan" monster from your Deck or GY to your hand whose original Level/Rank/Link Rating is not equal to the Tributed monster's. You can only use each effect of "Clown Clan "Finale"" once per turn.
